race.comment: Matthew Smith sends PLACID PEARL (2) to Queensland following recent stakes racing in Sydney. Travelled handy and did a great job to hold on for third at 100-1 in the Group 3 Epona over 1900m at Rosehill last start. Maps nicely in behind the speed and will find this far easier. Beautifully placed to take this out. AKKADIAN EMPEROR (1) stepped up to open company and was lining up for the hat trick but found a couple better late in the piece over 2000m at Doomben last Saturday. Easily won a similar race here three back with just 1.5kgs more. Leading contender. KUREDER (5) returned to form with a determined victory over a longer trip here four weeks ago. Has strung wins together before so he is a big chance again. ARTFUL GIRL (10) struggled in open company last weekend at Doomben but can bounce back in this more suitable assignment. In form mare LOVEY DOVEY (8) is on a seven-day back-up and should be hitting the line with gusto.
